name: @equaltoai/greater-components-soul
description: Reachability and contact-preferences UI for lesser-soul v3 (channels, preferences, best-contact helper).

ChannelsDisplay.description: Displays ENS/email/phone channels with verification and status.

ContactPreferencesViewer.description: Read-only renderer for v3 contact preferences (availability, languages, rate limits).

ContactPreferencesEditor.description: Editor for v3 contact preferences with safe defaults and structured inputs.

BestWayToContact.description: Helper UI that recommends the best inbound contact channel based on declared preferences and available channels.

utils.description: Recommendation and formatting helpers for channels/preferences.
